TimeEntry.Title: Avery miller needs scanning on her pc
TimeEntry.Notes:
Received a request from Ajay regarding scanning Avery Miller's computer for viruses and ensuring everything is up to date.

Logged into the system and started a full scan using Windows Defender. The user's battery was running low, so I also recommended plugging the system in for uninterrupted scanning.

Additionally, I ran security scans using Huntress and CrowdStrike, which are taking a longer time to complete. I'm currently waiting for the scans to finish.

I will update the user once all scans are completed.Handover given to the next shift for monitoring the scan.

TimeEntry.Title: Avery miller needs scanning on her pc
TimeEntry.Notes: As per the handover from the previous shift, connected to the machine to check the scanning status. The CrowdStrike scan was canceled due to a 2-hour timeout. Re-ran the scan and increased the timeout to 4 hours. Also initiated a scan from the Huntress portal after the Microsoft Defender scan was completed. Upon completion of all scans, no suspicious activity or viruses were found on the machine. Updated Josh about the same via the Teams channel
